title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
company: Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
